overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game featuring an FBI agent exploring a dark police station or medical facility at night. The character uses a flashlight to navigate corridors, locker rooms, and a morgue, eventually encountering an NPC officer and discovering an autopsy room.

approaching metal door at end of hallway

round analog clock mounted above bulletin board
wall-mounted shelf with boxes and files

segments.scene_description: The FBI agent begins in a small break room with a bulletin board and wall clock, flashlight illuminating the concrete walls. The character moves through a narrow corridor toward a metal security door, briefly opening the inventory interface to check items.

turning slightly toward locker room area

segments.scene_description: The agent moves through a metal door into a utility corridor featuring a water cooler and fire extinguisher. The environment shows exposed brick and concrete pillars as the character progresses toward a locker room area.

segments.scene_description: In the locker room, the agent systematically searches metal lockers with a flashlight, examining the interior shelves. A wooden bench sits in the center of the room and a jacket hangs on the wall nearby.

events.description: exiting locker room into main corridor with push-bar exit door
female officer opens secure door after dialogue interaction

metal door with push bar and green signage

segments.scene_description: Exiting the locker room, the agent encounters a female police officer standing by a secure exit door. After a brief interaction, the officer opens the door, revealing the morgue area beyond. A duffel bag rests on a nearby bench.

scene_state.functional_zone: morgue and autopsy facility with medical equipment

entering autopsy room with body on examination table and medical staff present
examining medical cabinets and equipment in storage room

wall-mounted cabinet with glass doors containing supplies

stainless steel counter with basin and faucets
industrial shelving with boxes and containers
tall display cabinet with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The agent enters the morgue facility, passing a caution-taped door and medical storage areas. The scene transitions to a brightly lit autopsy room where medical staff examine a body on a stainless steel table. The character explores the room, shining a flashlight on medical cabinets, equipment carts, and storage racks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dim, industrial facility that transitions from cramped utility spaces into a sterile, brightly lit medical wing. It begins in a small break room with a bulletin board and wall clock, moving through a narrow corridor and past a metal security door. As the agent progresses, the environment shifts into a utility corridor of exposed brick and concrete pillars before opening into a locker room where the flashlight illuminates metal shelves and a wooden bench. The scene then moves toward a secure exit where a female police officer grants access to the morgue, passing caution tape and medical storage areas. Finally, the camera enters a brightly lit autopsy room, shifting from the dark corridors to a clinical space filled with stainless steel tables, medical cabinets, and equipment carts.
